# mailgun_smtp_credential (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a specific SMTP credential for a Mailgun domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain the SMTP credential belongs to.
- `login` (String) The login name for SMTP authentication (without the @domain part).

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when this credential was created.
- `full_login` (String) The full SMTP login in format 'login@domain'. Use this value for SMTP authentication.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this credential in format 'domain/login'.
